use_codes.desc: SINGLE-DOSE ADMINISTRATION BY THE EPIDURAL ROUTE, AT THE LUMBAR LEVEL, FOR THE TREATMENT OF PAIN FOLLOWING MAJOR SURGERY

indications.text:
DepoDur is an extended-release liposome injection of morphine sulfate intended for single-
dose administration by the epidural route, at the lumbar level, for the treatment of pain
following major surgery. DepoDur is administered prior to surgery or after clamping the
umbilical cord during cesarean ...
